provenance.metric: Share of consumers with FICO score >= 670 (prime+)
provenance.url: TBD — cite the exact Experian source page/report on population
provenance.notes: Per-state overrides in `states` (2-letter USPS code -> share 0-1). Any state absent from `states` falls back to national_share (0.704) via creditShareForState(). National 70.4% is the locked anchor (decision_log / handoff). The Sept-2025 per-state table is proprietary Experian data (no free API) and must be populated from a Trace-provided source; until then `state_data_pending` is true and all states use the national fallback.
